title: Anukoolakkobba Ganda
desc: Radha, a rich girl, falls in love with Raja, a mechanic. Complications arise when her father learns about their relationship and tries to separate the couple.

title: Mukunda Murari
desc: After an environmental disaster ruins his business and family, Mukunda, an atheist shop owner, sets out to sue God for his justice.

title: Ramakrishna
desc: Rama's father wants him to marry his friend's daughter, Lakshmi. In a case of mistaken identity, he ends up meeting Seetha instead of Lakshmi and falls in love with her.

title: Ravivarma
desc: Ravivarma is an artist with a special talent. However, his life turns upside down when he helps a police officer trace a notorious criminal through his artistic skills.

title: Aidu Beralu
desc: By fostering harmony and mutual understanding within a team, a group of people learn to overcome their differences and lead to more innovative solutions.

title: Teleshopping
desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Gokula
desc: Four orphan friends pretend to be the grandchildren of an old man to inherit his fortune.

title: Yuga Purusha
desc: While on holiday, a man has visions of a past life. As memories resurface, his girlfriend watches him fall for an older woman.

title: Gadi bidi Aliya
desc: When an arrogant young woman frames a poor canteen owner and gets him arrested, he decides to teach her a lesson.

title: Premotsava
desc: Bharath is all set to get married to Bhavana, a teacher. However, uncertainty ensues when his former lover, who he believed was dead, enters his life.

title: Devara Teerpu
desc: A man feels guilty about using a fake name for a passport to fly to London and tries to rectify his fraudulence by searching for a woman with a similar name.
